---
title: "Iris Carnahan"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Hi! My name is Iris and I'm from San Diego. I am currently a third year pursuing an Environmental Studies (B.S.) degree at the University of California, Santa Barbara. This is my professional portfolio, where you can learn more about my academic coursework, leadership, and favorite pass-times. I hope you enjoy!

:::
